description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe with a sleek, modern design, featuring a predominantly black upper accented by metallic gold lines and turquoise highlights. The shoe has a mid-ankle collar for added support, and the lacing system is traditional with black laces running through reinforced eyelets. The midsole and outsole are thick and semi-translucent, rendered in a turquoise hue that complements the side detailing. The upper material appears to be synthetic leather or coated textile, giving it a glossy, almost futuristic finish. Subtle paneling and stitching add structure and visual interest, while the overall build suggests durability and comfort for urban activities. The shoe is clean and shows no signs of wear, indicating it is in new condition.
description: A glossy black high-top athletic shoe with gold and turquoise accents, featuring a thick turquoise sole and traditional lacing. The design is modern and clean, suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper with gold lines, turquoise side accent, and thick turquoise sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the toe box, lacing system, and the width of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible turquoise accent and gold detailing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel structure, turquoise heel accent, and the high collar.
